auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Ipregistry API key used in the Authorization: ApiKey header. View and manage keys at https://dashboard.ipregistry.co/signin?redirect=/keys.

actions.name: batch_lookup_asns
actions.description: Look up data for multiple Autonomous System Numbers with Ipregistry.

items.description: The Autonomous System Number to look up, such as AS15169 or 15169.

asns.description: The Autonomous System Numbers to look up.

fields.description: Optional Ipregistry field selection expression used to limit the returned payload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for batch ASN lookup with Ipregistry.

items.description: One result payload returned by Ipregistry.

results.description: The Ipregistry result payloads in request order.

actions.name: batch_lookup_ips
actions.description: Look up Ipregistry data for multiple IPv4 or IPv6 addresses in one request.

items.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

ipAddresses.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 addresses to look up.

includeHostname.description: Whether Ipregistry should resolve and include hostname data.

fields.description: Optional Ipregistry field selection expression used to limit the returned payload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for batch IP lookup with Ipregistry.

items.description: One result payload returned by Ipregistry.

results.description: The Ipregistry result payloads in request order.

actions.name: lookup_asn
actions.description: Look up data for one Autonomous System Number with Ipregistry.

asn.description: The Autonomous System Number to look up, such as AS15169 or 15169.

fields.description: Optional Ipregistry field selection expression used to limit the returned payload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for looking up one Autonomous System Number with Ipregistry.

actions.name: lookup_ip
actions.description: Look up geolocation, connection, company, currency, time zone, and security data for one IP address.

ipAddress.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

includeHostname.description: Whether Ipregistry should resolve and include hostname data.

fields.description: Optional Ipregistry field selection expression used to limit the returned payload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for looking up one IP address with Ipregistry.

actions.name: parse_user_agents
actions.description: Parse one or more user-agent strings with Ipregistry.

fields.description: Optional Ipregistry field selection expression used to limit the returned payload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for parsing user-agent strings with Ipregistry.

items.description: One result payload returned by Ipregistry.

results.description: The Ipregistry result payloads in request order.
